title: Real interest rates and international capital flows
description: Practice what you've learned about differences in real interest rates affect the movement of financial capital between countries. In this exercise, you'll get practice synthesizing many of the models you have seen so far to better understand the chain of events that occurs when different countries have different relative real interest rates.
topic_path: Open economy: international trade and finance
Real Interest Rates and International Capital Flows
Real interest rates and international capital flows

assessment_items.question_content:
As a result of deficit spending, the government of Japan borrowed money in the market for loanable funds. 

**What happens to the exchange rate for the yen and Japanese exports as the result of the change in the market for loanable funds?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Yen appreciates; exports decrease
Yen depreciates; exports decrease
Yen depreciates; exports increase
Yen doesn’t change;  Japanese exports don’t change
Yen appreciates; Japanese exports are unaffected

assessment_items.question_content:
An increase in the savings rates in Johnsrudia has affected the market for loanable funds.

**What effect does this have on real interest rates and the value of Johnsrudia's currency?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Real interest rates decrease and the currency depreciates
Real interest rates decrease and the currency appreciates
Real interest rates decrease and the currency isn't affected.
Neither real interest rates nor the value of its currency are affected.
Real interest rates increase and the currency appreciates.

assessment_items.question_content:
The government of Marthaland has a budget surplus.

**What effect does this have in Marthaland on real interest rates and the value of Marthaland’s currency in the short run and economic growth in the long run?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Real interest rates decrease, Marthaland’s currency depreciates, and economic growth increases.
Real interest rates decrease, Marthaland’s currency appreciates, and economic growth decreases.
Real interest rates increase, Marthaland’s currency depreciates, and economic growth increases.
Real interest rates increase, Marthaland’s currency depreciates, and economic growth isn’t affected.
Real interest rates decrease, Marthaland’s currency isn’t affected, and economic growth isn’t affected.

assessment_items.question_content:
Frankland’s citizens are living longer, which has resulted in more retirement saving.

**Which of the following best describes the effect of this action on real interest rates in Frankland and the value of Frankland’s currency, the percy?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Real interest rates decrease and the Frankland percy depreciates.
Real interest rates decrease and the value of the Frankland percy is unaffected.
Real interest rates decrease and the Frankland percy appreciates.
Real interest rates increase and the Frankland percy depreciates.
Real interest rates increase and the Frankland percy doesn’t change.

assessment_items.question_content:
The economies of Maxistan and Ile are open economies.

**If Maxistan runs a budget surplus, how will this impact Ile in the short run?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Increases the unemployment rate in Ile
Decreases the demand for financial assets in Ile
Ile’s currency depreciates
Ile’s net exports will increase
Increases inflation in Ile

assessment_items.question_content:
Maxistan and Ile are trading partners. The savings rate in Maxistan recently increased, which affected real interest rates there. 

**What effect does this have on real interest rates in Maxistan and the value of Ile's currency?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Maxistan's real interest rate decreases and the value of Ile's currency appreciates
Maxistan's real interest rate decreases and the value of Ile's currency depreciates
Maxistan's real interest rate decreases and Ile's currency isn't affected.
Maxistan's real interest rate increases and Ile's currency isn't affected.
Maxistan's real interest rate increases and Ile's currency appreciates.

assessment_items.question_content:
Dodgeland and Burginville are trading partners. An increase in the demand for capital in Dodgeland has affected its market for loanable funds.

**What effect does the change in the market for loanable funds in Dodgeland have on Burginville's currency and the real interest rate in Burginville?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Burginville's real interest rates decrease and its currency depreciates.
Burginville's real interest rates decrease and its currency appreciates.
Burginville's real interest rates aren't affected and its currency appreciates.
Neither Burginville's real interest rate nor currency are affected.

assessment_items.question_content:
An increase in business optimism in Maxistan has changed the real interest rate in Maxistan which has resulted in a change in the flow of financial assets between Maxistan and its trading partners and impacted the value of Maxistan’s currency.

**Which of the following describes an appropriate action that the central bank of Maxistan could take to offset the change in the value of Maxistan’s currency?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Sell its currency or buy another country’s currency.
Buy its currency or sell another country’s currency.
Sell bonds
Increase the demand for money
Increase interest payments made on excess reserves held by banks

assessment_items.question_content:
**What happens to interest rates and exports in the short run in Atlantis if the central bank of Atlantis buys bonds?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Interest rates decrease; exports increase
Interest rates increase; exports decrease
Interest rates decrease; no change in exports
No change in interest rates, exports increase
Interest rates increase; exports increase

assessment_items.question_content:
The Great Central Bank of Hamsterville sells bonds, which has influenced the interest rate in Hamsterville.

**What is the impact of this action on the financial account, the value of the Hamsterville currency (the Hamsterville snark), and imports into Hamsterville in the short run?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Financial account increases; snark appreciates; imports increase
Financial account decreases; snark appreciates; imports increase
Financial account increases; snark depreciates; imports decrease
Financial account increases; snark appreciates; imports decrease
No impact on the financial account; snark appreciates; imports increase

assessment_items.question_content:
Irrational exuberance by firms in Hamsterville has lead to an increase in investment in capital. Most firms in Hamsterville borrow to pay for investment in plant and equipment.

**What effect does this have on real interest rates, exports, and long-run aggregate supply?**


[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Real interest rates increase, exports decrease, and long-run aggregate supply increases.
Real interest rates increase, exports decrease, and long-run aggregate supply decreases.
Real interest rates increase, exports increase, and long-run aggregate supply decreases.
Real interest rates decrease, exports increase, and long-run aggregate supply isn’t affected.
Real interest rates decrease, exports decrease, and long-run aggregate supply isn’t affected.

assessment_items.question_content:
The government of Hamiltonia engaged in expansionary fiscal policy and, as a result, ran a budget deficit. Assume Hamiltonia has an open economy and a flexible exchange rate.

**What happens to real interest rates and the value of Hamiltonia's currency as a result of the budget deficit?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: There will be an increase in real interest rates and an appreciation of Hamiltonia’s currency.
There will be a decrease in real interest rates and an appreciation of Hamiltonia’s currency.
There will be a decrease in investment in plant and equipment and a depreciation in Hamiltonia’s currency.
There will be an increase in investment in plant and equipment and a depreciation in Hamiltonia’s currency.
There will be an increase in real interest rates and a depreciation of Hamiltonia’s currency.

assessment_items.question_content:
The currency of Hamsterville is the snark. The central bank of Hamsterville recently engaged in expansionary monetary policy.

**What effect will expansionary monetary policy have on interest rates, the price level, and the exchange rate of the snark?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Interest rates and the exchange rate will decrease, but the price level will increases
Interest rates will decrease, but the price level and exchange rate will increase.
Interest rates, the price level, and the exchange rate will decrease.
Interest rates and the price level will increase, but the exchange rate will decrease.
Interest rates and the price level will decrease, but the exchange rate will increase.
